sourceRefs.fallbackText: asyncio is a library to write concurrent code using the async/await syntax.

sourceRefs.fallbackText: asyncio is used as a foundation for multiple Python asynchronous frameworks that provide high-performance network and web-servers, database connection libraries, distributed task queues, etc.
